## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **X-Link Version** | e.g. v0.7.1 |
| **Operating System** | e.g. Windows 11 23H2 / macOS 15.1 / Ubuntu 24.04 |
| **Connection Mode** | TUN / System Proxy |
| **Protocol** | VLESS / VMess / Trojan / Shadowsocks / SOCKS / HTTP |
| **Transport** | TCP / WebSocket / gRPC / HTTP/2 |

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Configure '...'

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.
